summary: Your 24/7 personal AI agent Discussion | Link
content: Gemini Spark helps you navigate your digital life. Give it a task and it works in the background 24/7, even if your phone and laptop are turned off. It operates autonomously, but always under your direction. You choose to turn it on and it's designed to check with you before taking major actions.
chineseSummary: 您的 24/7 私人人工智能代理 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Gemini Spark 帮助您驾驭数字生活。给它一个任务，它就会在后台 24/7 运行，即使您的手机和笔记本电脑已关闭。它自主运行，但始终在您的指导下。您选择将其打开，它会在采取重大操作之前与您进行核对。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
